sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44197" key="eu)kata/potos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐκατά-ποτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44197.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily swallowed</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
